content.body:
Inspired by app-onboarding-questionnaire skill patterns:

1. Status-first — shows what already exists before asking anything
   (managers, specialists, context files, CLAUDE.md, test framework,
   design system, CI)

2. Contextual confirmation — infers project type from stack and asks
   "is that right?" instead of a blind dropdown. Pre-fills description
   from package.json when available.

3. Discovery inteligente — expanded scanner detects test frameworks
   (Vitest, Jest, Playwright, Cypress), design systems (shadcn/ui,
   Tailwind), and CI (GitHub Actions). Questions are conditional —
   skips what code already answers.

4. Resumability — saves state to .claude/.init-state.json at each
   phase. If interrupted, next run offers to resume or start fresh.
   State expires after 24h.

5. Gap-filling mode — when project is already set up, offers to only
   fill missing pieces instead of overwriting everything.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cli): smarter init with 5 onboarding patterns
